3443032375.title: Jonsbo D32 PRO MATC Casing Mini Desktop Case
3443032375.detail_text: JONSBO D32 PRO Micro-ATX PC Case-【Unmatched Price per Performance】 - 24L Volume offer A/B mode for MB( Standard MB and BTF MB), Achieve different compatibility optimization solutions 【High Compatibility】- Micro-ATX upgrade to support the main popular hardware , such as BTF motherboard, Max.Length 365mm GPU，ATX/SFX-LSFX PSU （16A plug except), 240AIO,163mm Height Air Cooler etc. 【Optimize visual design】: Tempered side glass shows the Concise and neat working hardware.(Adjustable motherboard cable management cover to block visible complex wires) ​ 【Optimized installation experience design】: detachable PCI-E position unobstructed opening design, easy insertion of large graphics card 【Size】：D396×W207×H314mm (Foot included)： 【MB support】：MINI-ITX/MICRO-ATX standard /MICRO-ATX (Back-connect, the case needs to be switched to B mode) 【Drive Bay】： 2.5": up to 4, depends on other hardware configurations,3.5": up to 2 (shared with the 2 x 2.5" mounts), depends on other hardware configurations (depends on other hardware configurations) 【PSU Clearance】：Max.L200mm (not compatible with 16A plugs) ​【Radiator support】：Top，up to 240mm 【CPU Air Cooler Clearance】： In A mode,H170mm (Intel CPU) or 169mm (AMD CPU) In B mode,H164mm (Intel CPU) or 163mm (AMD CPU) 【FAN】：Top: 2 x 120mm / 2 x 140mm Rear: 1 x 120mm Bottom: 3 x 120mm / 2 x 140mm 【Front IO Port】：USB3.2 Gen1 Type-A*2/USB3.2 Gen 2 Type-C*1/AUDIO*1 MIC*1​
3443032375.detail_html:
• JONSBO D32 PRO Micro-ATX PC Case-【Unmatched Price per Performance】 - 24L Volume offer A/B mode for MB( Standard MB and BTF MB), Achieve different compatibility optimization solutions
  • 【High Compatibility】- Micro-ATX upgrade to support the main popular hardware , such as BTF motherboard, Max.Length 365mm GPU，ATX/SFX-LSFX PSU （16A plug except), 240AIO,163mm Height Air Cooler etc.
  • 【Optimize visual design】: Tempered side glass shows the Concise and neat working hardware.(Adjustable motherboard cable management cover to block visible complex wires) ​
  • 【Optimized installation experience design】: detachable PCI-E position unobstructed opening design, easy insertion of large graphics card
  • 【Size】：D396×W207×H314mm (Foot included)：
  • 【MB support】：MINI-ITX/MICRO-ATX standard /MICRO-ATX (Back-connect, the case needs to be switched to B mode)
  • 【Drive Bay】： 2.5": up to 4, depends on other hardware configurations,3.5": up to 2 (shared with the 2 x 2.5" mounts), depends on other hardware configurations (depends on other hardware configurations)
  • 【PSU Clearance】：Max.L200mm (not compatible with 16A plugs)
  • ​【Radiator support】：Top，up to 240mm 【CPU Air Cooler Clearance】： In A mode,H170mm (Intel CPU) or 169mm (AMD CPU) In B mode,H164mm (Intel CPU) or 163mm (AMD CPU)
  • 【FAN】：Top: 2 x 120mm / 2 x 140mm Rear: 1 x 120mm Bottom: 3 x 120mm / 2 x 140mm 【Front IO Port】：USB3.2 Gen1 Type-A*2/USB3.2 Gen 2 Type-C*1/AUDIO*1 MIC*1​

product.highlights:
• O11 Vision-M
  • Compact dual-chamber design with three-sided glass showcase

  • Adjustable anti-sag bracket for horizontal GPUs
  • Supports ATX PSU up to 182 mm
  • Hidden storage support for up to three 2.5”SSDs or one 3.5”HDD + one 2.5”SSD

page_json.description: O11 Vision-M Compact dual-chamber design with three-sided glass showcase Front, side, and top tempered glass panels for panoramic viewing Supports M-ATX and Mini-ITX motherboards Supports graphics cards up to 410 mm Supports up to 360 mm top-mounted radiator Glass panel mesh cutout improves top airflow Pre-installed 140 mm fan enhances radiator cooling Hidden second-chamber routing for tubes and cables Removable modular divider for flexible interior presentation Optional 9.2”LCD kit for system monitoring and custom visuals Adjustable anti-sag bracket for horizontal GPUs Supports ATX PSU up to 182 mm Hidden storage support for up to three 2.5”SSDs or one 3.5”HDD + one 2.5”SSD

product.highlights:
LANCOOL 207

  • M-ATX sized case with ATX compatibility
  • Includes 2 x 140mm ARGB fans at the front and 2 x 120mm PWM fans above the PSU shroud for maximum out-of-box cooling
  • Fully ventilated mesh panels on the front, top, and bottom, ensuring excellent airflow
  • Front-mounted PSU with side-facing connector ports for easy cable management
  • Motherboard tray position redesigned to improve top radiator clearance and locate bottom fans directly under the GPU for better cooling
  • GPU anti-sag bracket with vertical and horizontal adjustment to support different GPUs

product.highlights:
• Dimension: 440 x 230 x 500 mm (DxWxH) 
  • Form Factor: Midtower / Medium Chassis
  • Materials: Steel Chassis, Tempered Glass, ABS plastic
  • Motherboard Support: ATX, Micro ATX, Mini ITX, E-ATX (up to 280mm wide)
  • Front I/O: 1x USB 3.0, 1x USB-C 3.2 GEN2, Microphone/Headphone Combo,  Power Button, Reset Button, DRGB color button, DRGB Mode Button

  • Front and Side Tempered Glass Windows
  • 3x M25-120mm DRGB fans included
  • Supports up to 9x 120mm fan positions
  • Dedicated 360 radiator support in the top without restrictions
  • Support for the largest graphics cards without compromise

product.highlights:
• O11 Vision-M
  • Compact dual-chamber design with three-sided glass showcase
  • Front, side, and top tempered glass panels for panoramic viewing
  • Supports M-ATX and Mini-ITX motherboards
  • Supports graphics cards up to 410 mm
  • Supports up to 360 mm top-mounted radiator
  • Glass panel mesh cutout improves top airflow
  • Pre-installed 140 mm fan enhances radiator cooling
  • Hidden second-chamber routing for tubes and cables
  • Removable modular divider for flexible interior presentation
  • Optional 9.2”LCD kit for system monitoring and custom visuals
  • Adjustable anti-sag bracket for horizontal GPUs
  • Supports ATX PSU up to 182 mm
  • Hidden storage support for up to three 2.5”SSDs or one 3.5”HDD + one 2.5”SSD

aiTexts: The Alcatroz Azzura Millenia is a compact PC desktop case supporting MATX motherboards, designed for space-efficient builds.
It includes a 242W Voltron Bronze PSU and integrated PC fans for reliable cooling and stable power delivery.
The case supports GPUs up to 240 x 140mm and offers multiple HDD/SSD slots for ample storage options.
Front I/O features USB 2.0 ports, audio and microphone jacks for convenient connectivity.
Its sturdy 0.4mm black coated construction ensures durability and an elegant look for daily use or gaming setups.

aiTexts: The Alcatroz Azzura Millenia is a compact mid-tower PC case designed to support MATX motherboards and GPUs up to 240 x 140mm.
It includes a 242W Voltron Bronze power supply with multiple connectors for motherboard, CPU, SATA, and HDD devices.
Constructed with durable 0.4mm black-coated metal, it offers versatile storage options with SSD and HDD bays.
Ventilation is ensured with multiple fans including front, side, and rear placements for efficient cooling.
Connectivity features USB 2.0/3.0 ports, audio, and microphone jacks for convenient access.
Ideal for building space-efficient, reliable desktop PCs with good airflow and component compatibility.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.
